summary: Iteration 14: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) Testing - Backend 100% (22/22 tests passed), Frontend 100% verified. All role-based login flows, dashboards, and navigation working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Teacher login correctly redirects to /TeacherDashboard with teacher-specific navigation (Dashboard, My Students, Announcements, Schedule, Eligibility, NxMessages)
School Admin login correctly redirects to /SchoolAdminDashboard with academic-only navigation (Dashboard, Students, Faculty, Clubs, Admin, Users, NxMessages) - NO sports features
Coach login correctly redirects to /Dashboard with full sports navigation (NxLab, Roster, S&C, Recruiting, Analytics, etc.)
Principal login correctly redirects to /Dashboard (NOT SchoolAdminDashboard) with full coach/admin navigation including sports features
Invite form shows all 5 invite type tabs: Coach/Staff, Teacher, School Admin, Player, Parent
Teacher invite type correctly hides sports selection and shows Department field
School Admin invite type correctly hides sports selection
Teacher dashboard shows correct data: classes, student count, subjects, recent grades with student names
School Admin dashboard shows correct stats: Total Students, Active Students, Faculty, Active Faculty, Clubs

dashboard_data.recent_grades: Shows student names with letter grades ✓

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14: RBAC implementation complete. Teacher and School Admin roles have dedicated dashboards and navigation. Teachers see TeacherDashboard with class schedules, student counts, and recent grades. School Admins see SchoolAdminDashboard with academic stats (students, faculty, clubs) and NO sports features. Principal (head_coach) still sees full coach navigation with sports features. Invite form has 5 tabs: Coach/Staff, Teacher, School Admin, Player, Parent. Teacher invite hides sports and shows Department field. School Admin invite hides sports. All 22 backend tests passed. All frontend flows verified via Playwright.
